title: Interview Coaching Follow-Up
text:
## Interview Coaching Follow-Up

**Candidate:** {person}

**Mock interview result:** {adjective}, with only {number} accidental mentions of {plural noun}.

**Best answer:** Explained teamwork by describing a {adjective} time they had to {verb} near a {place}.

**Needs practice:** Looking at the interviewer instead of the {color} {object}.

**Employment specialist tip:** Pause {adverb}, breathe through your {body part}, and say you are {emotion} about the role.

**Next interview:** {day of week} with a {job}; wear a {clothing item}.
